# Dmitry (Dee) Kargaev

> Author, AI Engineer, and Product Designer based in Los Angeles. Author of "Don't Replace Me: A Survival Guide to the AI Apocalypse." Former Lead Product Designer at VALK, a $4B+ fintech platform used by 70+ banks across 15 countries. Now builds multi-agent AI systems and ships products for founders.

Dmitry Kargaev (also known as Dee Kargaev, Dmitrii Kargaev, or Deeflect) is a Russian-American AI engineer and product designer. He started freelancing at age 14 in Irkutsk, Russia, studied Computer & Information Systems Security at Moscow State Linguistic University, worked remotely from 6 countries, then spent 5 years as the sole product designer at VALK (now DatAI Network). He is now based in Los Angeles, running Dee Agency — a solo design, code & AI studio for founders.

He is the author of "Don't Replace Me," a book about AI career resilience with 24 actionable rules. He builds open-source Rust CLI tools for AI agents (dee.ink), writes about AI engineering and building in public, and has built 15+ agent systems in production.

## Key Works
- [Don't Replace Me — A Survival Guide to the AI Apocalypse](https://dontreplace.me): Book, 235 pages, published March 2026. Available on Amazon in paperback, hardcover, and Kindle.
- [dee.ink CLI Tools](https://dee.ink): 31 open-source Rust CLI tools for LLMs and humans. JSON output, pipe-friendly, single-purpose.
- [clawbot.blog](https://www.clawbot.blog): Independent coverage of OpenClaw, AI agents, and the tools that power them.

## Blog Posts (Selected)
- [SEO Is Dead? No. But the Game Changed.](https://blog.deeflect.com/seo-is-dead-long-live-geo/)
- [31 Rust CLI Tools Built for AI Agents](https://blog.deeflect.com/dee-ink/)
- [The 3-Month Gap: Building AI Agents That Actually Work](https://blog.deeflect.com/10-debugging-agents/)
- [Universal MCP Server: Two Tools, 56 APIs](https://blog.deeflect.com/09-mcp-server/)
- [Prompt Engineering is Dead](https://blog.deeflect.com/08-prompt-eng-dead/)
- [My Coding Stack is 4 Models Deep](https://blog.deeflect.com/06-coding-stack/)
- [Why AI Products Have Terrible UX](https://blog.deeflect.com/03-ai-bad-ux/)

## Services (Dee Agency)
- Landing Page Design & Build: $2,500
- Idea to MVP: $7,000
- AI Integration & Automation: $3,000
- UX Audit + Fixes: $1,500
- Personal AI Agent Setup: $2,000
